accountEnablementNotification.enabled: The RSpace system administrator has enabled your user account. You can now log in to RSpace.

defaultWelcome.access: You can access the application at RSpace.
defaultWelcome.browserAdvice:
We support recent versions of Chrome, Safari and Firefox.
We do not support Edge or Internet Explorer.
defaultWelcome.contact: For any help, comments, or questions, contact support@researchspace.com.
defaultWelcome.groupMember: You are part of the Lab Group ''{0}'', and can share documents, send messages, and collaborate with other members of the group.
defaultWelcome.guidanceIntro: Here is some guidance for getting started with RSpace.
defaultWelcome.guidanceVideo: As background you might like to watch our Getting Started for Researchers video.
defaultWelcome.helpDocs: Our full Guidance Notes are also available, and can be accessed through the in-app Need Help? button on the bottom-right of RSpace.
defaultWelcome.individualUser: You are registered as an individual user.
defaultWelcome.intro: Welcome to ResearchSpace! We're pleased that you are using our system and we want to make your experience as positive as possible.
defaultWelcome.recommendModernBrowser: RSpace uses modern HTML technology, and to get the best experience we recommend a modern browser:
defaultWelcome.subject: Welcome to RSpace

emailChangeConfirmation.body: Your RSpace email address was updated. The new address is {0}.
emailChangeConfirmation.ifNotYou: If you did not just change your email, please get in touch with your RSpace support team.
emailChangeConfirmation.subject: Email address update

emailChangeVerification.body: Please use the link below to verify and activate your new email account in RSpace.

genericAccountActivation.activated: Your account is now activated and can be accessed by going to {0} in your browser.
genericAccountActivation.subject: RSpace account activated

genericAccountDenial.denied: Unfortunately, your request was not accepted.
genericAccountDenial.subject: RSpace account denied

genericAccountReview.body: Thank you for registering with RSpace.
genericAccountReview.contactSupport: Please contact support@researchspace.com for more information.

newUserAccountComplete.body:
The RSpace system administrator has created a {0} account for you.

To log into your server, open RSpace.

Your username for this account is {2}.
Your system administrator can provide your login password if they have not already done so. If your server is using a single sign-on technology provided by your institution then your login credentials are most likely the same username and password you use to access all other institutional systems.

To change your profile details, go to My RSpace > My Profile.

For documentation and instructional videos, use the Need Help? button in RSpace or visit the RSpace help website. To request assistance from ResearchSpace support, select Chat with us in the help interface.
newUserAccountComplete.subject: RSpace account created
